name_en: BV really understands consumers, making this bestseller irresistible. A must-have for going out (Large). Andiamo. Friends who surf the internet often notice that Guo Caijie, Ning Zetao, Mika, Tong Liliya, Yu Feihong, and Du Juan have all carried this bag. As one of the 2023 bestsellers, it debuted in the Matthieu Blazy 2023 Summer Collection. Crafted with exquisite leatherwork, it meets the dressing needs of all people and occasions. Available in three sizes, it emphasizes practicality and versatility. Elegant, versatile, and not limited by age or gender. Low-key, simple, durable, and really loveable.
